scripts.build: pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/contracts build && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/ui build && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/desktop-app build:app && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/extension build:app
scripts.test: pnpm test:scripts && node ./scripts/check-silent-catches.mjs && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/extension build && pnpm lint:ui-boundaries && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/ui test && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/contracts test && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/desktop-app test:app && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/extension test:app
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/contracts build && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/desktop-app typecheck:app && pnpm --filter @immersive-subs/extension typecheck:app
